ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., AdaBoost, Logistic Regression) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Link to the model's source code */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the model (e.g., NLP, computer vision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or descriptions for the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "parent_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent version (for versioning and lineage tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_dataset" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation dataset used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model evaluator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_projects" (
  "model_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-project link */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was added to the project */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the model to the project */,
  "removed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was removed from the project */,
  "removed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who removed the model from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_projects_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_projects_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model (optional) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project (optional) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model (optional) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project (optional) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "dismissed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was dismissed */,
  "dismissed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who dismissed the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
